title: BEM-841 execute 840 route
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 20:54 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
route=load('governance/state/bem840_route_after_bem839.json')
rs=route.get('status','unknown')
if rs=='triad_present_process_protocol':
    status='process_protocol_pending'
    next_action='parse real Claude response and create agreed protocol'
elif rs=='repair_real_claude_response_writer':
    req=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem841_real_response_required.md')
    req.write_text('# BEM-841 | REAL CLAUDE RESPONSE REQUIRED'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Claude Internal Auditor: write a real response to governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem841_claude_response.md. Include marker: CLAUDE RESPONSE. Include Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED. Address multi-agent architecture strategy and prior missing mailbox response. No issue comments.'+sep)
    status='real_response_request_written'
    next_action='dispatch Claude workflow and verify real response file'
elif rs=='repair_claude_runtime_state':
    status='runtime_state_repair_pending'
    next_action='patch dispatcher runtime state proof and dispatch again'
elif rs=='repair_dispatch_result_pipeline':
    status='dispatch_pipeline_repair_pending'
    next_action='patch queue/result writer and dispatch again'
else:
    status='unknown_route_pending'
    next_action='diagnose BEM-840 route state'
state={'bem':'BEM-841','status':status,'route_status':rs,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem841_execute_route_after_bem840.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem841_execute_route_after_bem840.md').write_text('# BEM-841 | Execute Route After BEM-840 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-841'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem841_execute_route_after_bem840.json','governance/reports/bem841_execute_route_after_bem840.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']
if status=='real_response_request_written': changed.append('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem841_real_response_required.md')
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-840 route: wrote explicit real Claude response request if only real response was missing')
"""
